title: EvalRequest
description:
The a2d-eval worker request (export-schema root, sibling of `SampleRequest`).
Eval is a read-only spot analysis on `model/`: this is fed on stdin, the worker
writes `out_dir/report.json` (+ `report.html` under `html`), never a manifest.

data.description: Held-out corpus for the likelihood bound + AR perplexity (local jsonl/txt).

eval_batch_size.description:
Sub-batch (micro-batch) size for the MDLM likelihood forward; 0 => one forward over
all chunks. Bounds peak eval memory to this many chunks, not `max_eval_tokens`.

max_eval_tokens.description: Cap on scored tokens, keeps eval bounded.

mc_samples.description: Monte-Carlo `t` draws per chunk for the MDLM bound (variance reduction).

num_steps.description: Denoiser steps for the diffusion throughput measurement.

source_model.description: `manifest.model_path` - the AR base for comparison; None => skip the AR baseline.

tasks.description: Downstream tasks to run; empty => all registered.
